package rulecoverage

func NegativeServiceStructHasExcessiveDependencyCount() string {
    ruleID := "service_struct_has_excessive_dependency_count"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Services with too many unrelated dependencies, which often signals a god-service."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
